# nmrML Test Fixtures

These fixtures are redistributed for parser tests. They are selected from the
official nmrML examples, not a full upstream archive.

## MIT nmrML Example Fixtures

The file committed under `mit/` is from the official nmrML example set.

- Project: nmrML
- Repository: https://github.com/nmrML/nmrML
- Website: https://nmrml.org/examples/
- License: MIT
- License URL: https://github.com/nmrML/nmrML/blob/master/LICENSE
- Copyright: Copyright (c) 2013 COSMOS, David Wishart
- Authors: Daniel Jacob, Daniel Schober, David Wishart, Joseph Cruz, Kenneth Haug, Luis Filipe de Figueiredo, Michael Wilson, Philippe Rocca-Serra, Reza Salek, Steffen Neumann, Timothy Jewison.
- Source page checked: https://nmrml.org/examples/2/
- Access date: 2026-05-25
- Changes: selected only the nmrML file needed for parser tests; filename was
  preserved.

## Example Provenance

- Example: Metabolic profiling of the Tomato plant, PhenoTom 2013, Bruker,
  including a processed 1R spectrum.
- Source file URL: https://nmrml.org/examples/2/MMBBI_10M12-CE01-1a.nmrML
- Reference authors: Laura Pascual; Jiaxin Xu; Benoit Biais; Mickael Maucourt; Patricia Ballias; Stephane Bernillon; Catherine Deborde; Daniel Jacob; Aurore Desgroux; Mireille Faurobert; Jean-Paul Bouchet; Yves Gibon; Annick Moing; Mathilde Causse.
- Reference: Journal of Experimental Botany, 2013, 64:5737-5752.
- Purpose: nmrML 1D processed spectrum reader and unified bundle-loader routing.
